class LolGetChampionAnalysis: data
class Data: core_items,boots,starter_items,fourth_items,fifth_items,runes,skills,summary
class CoreItems: ids,ids_names,pick_rate,play,win
class Runes: id,pick_rate,play,primary_page_id,primary_page_name,primary_rune_ids,primary_rune_names,secondary_page_id,secondary_page_name,secondary_rune_ids,secondary_rune_names,stat_mod_ids,stat_mod_names,win
class Skills: order,pick_rate,play,win
class Summary: average_stats
class AverageStats: win_rate,pick_rate,play

LolGetChampionAnalysis(Data(CoreItems([3070,3142,3042,6699],["Tear of the Goddess","Youmuu's Ghostblade","Muramana","Voltaic Cyclosword"],0.17,11228,6120),CoreItems([3158],["Ionian Boots of Lucidity"],0.36,32517,16122),CoreItems([1055,2003],["Doran's Blade","Health Potion"],0.91,90004,44040),[CoreItems([6694],["Serylda's Grudge"],0.3,10673,5952),CoreItems([3814],["Edge of Night"],0.18,6321,3564),CoreItems([6699],["Voltaic Cyclosword"],0.12,4261,2404)],[CoreItems([3814],["Edge of Night"],0.22,2521,1406),CoreItems([6694],["Serylda's Grudge"],0.14,1687,933),CoreItems([6695],["Serpent's Fang"],0.13,1473,743)],Runes(8230,0.19,19540,8200,"Sorcery",[8230,8226,8233,8236],["Stormraider's Surge","Manaflow Band","Absolute Focus","Gathering Storm"],8300,"Inspiration",[8304,8345],["Magical Footwear","Biscuit Delivery"],[5008,5008,5001],[5008,5008,5001],9485),Skills(["Q","W","E","Q","Q","W","Q","W","Q","W","Q","W","W","E","E"],0.25,18117,9414),Summary(AverageStats(0.49,0.09,175074))))
